overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban plaza and neon-lit covered arcade. The character stops to interact with a vending machine before continuing through the futuristic environment featuring vibrant pink and blue neon signage, concrete brutalist architecture, and scattered urban debris.

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza toward building with red graffiti and scattered trash piles

scattered garbage bags and debris piled against building wall
illuminated advertisement screen on building side
tall gray residential building with small windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, surrounded by concrete buildings. A prominent graffiti-covered building stands ahead while trash piles line the right side. Sparse pedestrians walk through the area as the camera moves forward toward a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with pink neon lighting

events.description: entering covered neon-lit walkway from open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking into covered arcade passing yellow food cart on the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside yellow food cart with illuminated menu

small vendor cart with yellow umbrella and service window
vertical and horizontal magenta neon tubes illuminating the space
concrete seating with cyan neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian arcade bathed in pink neon light. A yellow food cart sits on the right with a vendor nearby. The ceiling features red structural beams with integrated lighting, and blue glowing benches line the walkway as the character moves deeper into the covered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corridor with vending machines and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade past rows of vending machines and illuminated benches

entered.detail: bright cyan automated vendor with illuminated product display and anime-style graphics
magenta-colored automated vendor with glowing interface
raised concrete bed with small tree and shrubbery
large vertical displays showing animated product advertisements

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the enclosed corridor, the space is lined with colorful vending machines in turquoise and purple. Pink neon pillars illuminate the left side while digital advertisement screens glow on the right. The ground shows scattered litter and wet reflections from the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: vending machine interaction area in covered walkway

events.description: character stops walking to interact with vending machine interface

agents.ego_description: stopping at a glowing vending machine to look at available items while an NPC stands nearby

notable_agents.action: man in yellow jacket standing with arms crossed near vending machine

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a vending machine to interact with it. The machine displays glowing product options on its screen. An NPC in a yellow jacket stands nearby with arms crossed. The surrounding area features more neon lighting and scattered urban debris on the tiled floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor leading to open city streets with large digital billboards

events.description: lighting shifts from enclosed neon to brighter mixed lighting as approaching exit

agents.ego_description: continuing through the arcade toward an exit into a brighter area with large digital billboards visible ahead

entered.detail: massive curved advertisement display showing smiling face with 'SWEET CLEAN SPEED' text
red neon signage with 'BRAINPORT' text above corridor entrance
overhead highway or monorail track with red support beams

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character moving through a transitional corridor toward an exit. Large digital billboards become visible ahead, including one advertising 'SWEET CLEAN SPEED' with a prominent face. The environment shifts from enclosed neon to a mix of artificial and ambient light. A 'BRAINPORT' neon sign appears on the left as the character approaches the open city streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bleak, open urban plaza into a vibrant, neon-drenched pedestrian arcade before emerging back toward the city streets. It begins in a wide concrete plaza at night, passing graffiti-covered walls and piles of trash as the camera moves toward a covered walkway. As the scene transitions indoors, the environment shifts into a pink-lit arcade featuring red structural beams, blue glowing benches, and a yellow food cart. The camera then pushes deeper into the enclosed corridor, gliding past turquoise and purple vending machines and glowing digital advertisements reflected in the wet floor, eventually pausing as the character interacts with a machine beside an NPC in a yellow jacket. Finally, the movement continues through a transitional corridor lined with a Brainport sign and large digital billboards, shifting from the saturated artificial glow of the arcade back toward the ambient light of the open city.
